title: Independently verify strict clippy fix

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification only. Confirm strict clippy, formatting, and tests pass after MVP-072.
goals: Inspect the changed files to confirm the fix is limited to clippy cleanup and did not change behavior.
non_goals: Do not run real editor smoke.
success_criteria: If verification fails, revive MVP-072 or spawn a focused fix task.
If verification passes, mark strict static checks trusted for final acceptance.
